scenes.purpose: Introduces Ella and her struggle to debug a system anomaly.
scenes.objective: Ella wants to identify the source of the feedback loop causing the system anomaly.
scenes.turning_point: Ella notices an urgent alert about the system anomaly, prompting her to investigate further.
beats: Ella is debugging code at her workstation.
One of her monitors flashes an urgent alert.
Ella investigates the code and system logs for clues.

scenes.purpose: Introduces Marcus and his skepticism towards Ella's debugging efforts.
scenes.objective: Ella wants to resolve the issue despite Marcus's doubt.
scenes.turning_point: Marcus observes Ella's struggle, expressing skepticism about her abilities but ultimately remaining present.
beats: Marcus enters the data center and witnesses Ella's work.
Marcus questions Ella's competence in debugging.
Ella remains focused and determined to solve the problem.

scenes.purpose: Ella discovers a potential clue in the system logs and seeks Marcus's input.
scenes.objective: Ella wants to share her findings with Marcus and collaborate on solving the issue.
scenes.turning_point: Marcus acknowledges Ella's observation as potentially significant, leading to their collaboration.
beats: Ella analyzes system logs and identifies an unusual pattern.
Ella shares her findings with Marcus.
Marcus expresses intrigue and suggests further investigation.

scenes.purpose: Ella and Marcus collaborate to resolve the feedback loop anomaly.
scenes.objective: Together, Ella and Marcus want to identify and fix the root cause of the anomaly.
scenes.turning_point: Through teamwork and problem-solving, they successfully pinpoint and resolve the feedback loop issue.
beats: Ella and Marcus analyze data streams and optimize code segments.
They work together to improve data flow and system efficiency.
They finally identify and fix the root cause of the anomaly.
